name: Round
info: The heart of the app — a round line plus the connecting web.

name: Squares
info: Speed-sized squares stamped along the stroke.

name: Circles
info: Speed-sized circles stamped along the stroke.

name: Dots
info: Taps a dot at every grid intersection in reach.

name: Lines
info: Taps an angled line at every grid intersection in reach.

name: Ellipse
info: Stamps an ellipse at every grid intersection in reach.

name: Handfree
info: A round-with-connections motif mirrored across a grid.

name: Invisible
info: Deposits points (with a fading glow) without painting the layer.
